mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% increase in industrial production over the past 2 months signals a strengthening demand environment, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% decline in the unemployment rate over the past month signals a tightening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in tightening labor market periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 5% increase in housing starts over the past 2 months signals a strengthening supply environment, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening supply periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% decline in the federal funds rate and a 2% increase in industrial production over the past 2 months signal a strengthening demand environment and easing monetary cycle, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in strengthening demand and easing monetary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% increase in real GDP over the past 6 months signals a strengthening demand environment, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in strengthening demand periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% decline in the unemployment rate and a 2% increase in housing starts over the past 2 months signal a tightening labor market and strengthening supply environment, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in tightening labor market and strengthening supply periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5% decline in the federal funds rate over the past month signals an easing monetary cycle, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in easing monetary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
